title: The Cause of the Hostilities between Ja'farids and 'Alids at alMadinah
description: The Cause of the Hostilities between Ja'farids and 'Alids at alMadinah. Recorded under the year 266 AH (880–881 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 37.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 37
